# General repository rules
- All files must be UTF-8 encoded.
- All files must use LF line endings.
- All files must be wrtiten in English. Whenever editing a file, ensure that the content is in English. You are authorized to translate content to English if it is not already in English.
- en-US is mandatory even if the user writes to you in another language. You should always respond in English, even if the user writes to you in another language. You are authorized to translate content to English if it is not already in English.
- C23 and C++23 are favored languages for C and C++ code.
- FPGA code must favor SystemVerilog and Verilog, both in the most recent versions of the languages.
